notes: Run commands from the repository root with the gpm entrypoint available.
Do not mix ODbL or restricted sources into public beta packs.
Do not commit data/raw/ or full data/processed/ global builds.
Sample subsets may be committed under samples/ when size is modest.

steps.notes: Uses profile defaults. Restricted (GADM) and share-alike (OSM) sources are not on the default path and must stay isolated.
steps.title: Download core (public-safe) source artifacts only

steps.notes: Emit a build source manifest for the release lineage.
steps.title: Record downloaded source checksums and metadata

steps.notes: Writes data/processed/provinces.geojson. Features must carry license_lineage for the beta license audit.
steps.title: Generate modern land province draft

steps.notes: Gameplay-first sea zones; not legal maritime boundaries.
steps.title: Generate coastal and ocean sea zones

steps.notes: Marine edges appear only when sea_zones.geojson is present.
steps.title: Generate land (and marine) adjacency

steps.notes: CI-gating geometry, coverage, and graph checks.
steps.title: Run topology QA

steps.notes: Politics overlay only; does not rewrite province geometry.
steps.title: Resolve scenario ownership overlay: modern-baseline

steps.notes: Politics overlay only; does not rewrite province geometry.
steps.title: Resolve scenario ownership overlay: official-1836

steps.notes: Coverage, tag, component, and golden-floor checks.
steps.title: Run politics QA for official-1836

steps.notes: Politics overlay only; does not rewrite province geometry.
steps.title: Resolve scenario ownership overlay: official-1444

steps.notes: Writes release_manifest.json, LICENSE_AUDIT.md, attribution pack, ACCURACY.md, recipe files, game pack/, and optional atlas/.
steps.title: Package license-audited beta (game + atlas faces)
